name: Adroit
description: Gain X additional Block.

name: Clone
description: This card can be duplicated at Rest Sites.

name: Corrupted
description: Deal 50% more damage, but lose 2 HP.

name: Deprecated
description: This enchantment has been removed from the game.

name: Favored
description: This card's attack damage is doubled.

name: Glam
description: This card has Replay once per combat.

name: Goopy
description: This card gains Exhaust. When played, permanently increase this card's Block by 1.

name: Imbued
description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.

name: Instinct
description: Decrease the cost of this card by 1.

name: Momentum
description: Increase this card's attack damage by X this combat when played.

name: Nimble
description: Increases Block gained from this card by X.

name: Perfect Fit
description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your Draw Pile, place it on the top instead.

name: Royally Approved
description: This card has Innate and Retain.

name: Sharp
description: Increases damage on this card by X.

name: Slither
description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3.

name: Slumbering Essence
description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by 1 until it is played.

name: Soul's Power
description: This card loses Exhaust.

name: Sown
description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain X Energy.

name: Spiral
description: This card gains Replay 1.

name: Steady
description: This card gains Retain.

name: Swift
description: The first time you play this card, draw X cards.

name: Tezcatara's Ember
description: Costs 0 and gains Eternal.

name: Vigorous
description: The first time this card is played, it deals X additional damage.
